articles.author: Julie Bort
articles.title: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff: This isn’t our first SaaSpocalypse - TechCrunch
articles.description: Salesforce reported a solid year-end earnings and then pulled out all the stops to ward off more talk of the death of its business to AI.
articles.content:
Salesforce pulled out all the stops to convince investors that the AI revolution won’t be its death when it announced fourth-quarter earnings on Wednesday.
Salesforce reported a solid quarter of $10… [+3959 chars]
